title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1056
summary: Inder Singh was arrested after being found driving a Scooty containing 576 capsules of Tramadol (SPASMO-PROXYVON PLUS and SPAS-PARVION PLUS), which were recovered during a police check. He claimed he was falsely implicated and that the co-accused Arun Dhiman had purchased the drugs.
